text:
All code has been successfully copied to the `API_CODE` folder with:

- `backend/` - Flask API with Tuya integration
- `frontend/` - Web dashboard with device control
- `tinytuya.json` - Tuya credentials
- `tuya.py` - Simple control script
- `requirements.txt` - Dependencies
- `README.md` - Setup instructions

The system is ready to run from the new folder with all features working including the device control toggle.
